problem id: bcf0d51d
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(4) XOR SHR(6)) AND ROT(4)

examples:
  01100100 -> 01000000
  00111110 -> 11100000
  11011001 -> 10010001
  00001010 -> 10100000
  01111010 -> 10100001
  10110010 -> 00100010
  00011011 -> 10110000
  01001110 -> 11100000
  10011100 -> 11000000
  10101110 -> 11100010

query: 00000111
predicted answer: 01110000
